name: ACCLAIM
description: ACCLAIM (organic nitrate combined with L-arginine), is an oral proprietary nitrate therapeutic shown to induce coronary vasodilation while overcoming the significant problem of drug tolerance. ACCLAIM treat chronic angina, the chest pain that occurs from inadequate blood flow to the coronary arteries around the heart.
indication: Chronic angina and Coronary Artery Disease
mechanismOfAction: ACCLAIM is a proprietary combination of nitrate and L-arginine that provides the beneficial cardiovascular effects of nitrates. Combining L-arginine with organic nitrates prevents the endothelial cell's depletion of L-arginine and the associated problem of nitrate tolerance. By eliminating nitrate tolerance, ACCLAIM allows patients to receive the continuous, 24-hour benefit of a potent nitrate product, thus sustaining the desired vasodilation effect.
